prestazioni: BMW B48C20T0 (2.0L turbocharged inline-4) hybrid turbo upgrade to Garrett GT2867R Gen II with billet compressor wheel, 0.63 A/R turbine housing, and 3D-printed titanium wastegate actuator for 32 psi peak boost, paired with a custom 3.5" titanium downpipe by Remus with 200-cell catalytic converter for Euro 6d compliance

Full Schrick 264° camshaft set with 11.5mm lift, titanium retainers, and upgraded valve springs, mated to a custom ECU flash via MHD Stage 2+ OTS map with ethanol flex-fuel support (E85) and 2200cc high-flow injectors from Injector Dynamics, achieving 380+ WHP on 98 RON fuel

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, 24mm front/22mm rear sway bars from Eibach, and polyamide spherical bearing subframe bushings by 034 Motorsport, paired with a Wavetrac limited-slip differential and AP Racing 350mm 6-piston front brake kit with RSR 2-piece rotors
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders, custom 3D-printed front splitter, and a 200mm extended rear diffuser by Seibon, all finished in BMW Individual Frozen Deep Green with matte black accents

Recaro SPG XL seats with custom Alcantara/leather upholstery by Status Racing, featuring JCW GP3 embroidery and Schroth 6-point harnesses, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel in Alcantara with red stitching and a quick-release hub

Full carbon fiber interior trim by Vorsteiner, including dashboard, door cards, and center console, with a custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (FIA-spec, T45 steel) and a titanium shift knob by BMS with GP3 engraving
